failure_clusters.pattern: The agent flagged missing cellpadding/cellspacing and border-collapse as issues, but these are standard email patterns t
sample_reasonings: The agent flagged missing cellpadding/cellspacing and border-collapse as issues, but these are standard email patterns that are acceptable to omit. Not all email tables require these attributes.

Several flagged issues are not genuine problems. Missing xmlns:o is not required when xmlns:v is present, and missing MSO properties like mso-table-lspace are optimizations, not issues for a clean email.
The agent flagged 'gold' as an invalid CSS color value, but 'gold' is a valid named CSS color. This is a false positive that incorrectly flags standard CSS.

failure_clusters.pattern: The conditional logic is present but incomplete - there are empty {% if %} and {% else %} blocks that don't actually wra
sample_reasonings: The conditional logic is present but incomplete - there are empty {% if %} and {% else %} blocks that don't actually wrap the VIP and Standard sections as required by the logic specifications.

The logic fails to properly implement the requirement to 'show the personalized section only if a preference exists' - the personalized section still displays even when @preferredCategory is empty, just with blank category names.
While the code attempts to implement tier highlighting logic, the IF conditions are syntactically broken and would not function to highlight the correct tier cell as required.

failure_clusters.pattern: The dark mode colors are not visually coherent. The content section uses white background (#ffffff) with dark-bg class t
sample_reasonings: The dark mode colors are not visually coherent. The content section uses white background (#ffffff) with dark-bg class that changes to #1a1a2e in dark mode, but the text color #333333 becomes #e0e0e0, creating poor contrast ratios and inconsistent color relationships.

The header-bar preserves #004E89 on dark backgrounds which violates the color override request that specified #004E89 should become #1a3a5c. The price text also uses #1a3a5c which may have poor contrast on the #2a2a2a background.
